description_long: This is a robust, rectangular wooden storage box reinforced with metallic corner brackets and edges, giving it a sturdy and industrial appearance. The box is constructed from horizontal wooden planks with a warm, medium-brown finish, and features visible wood grain and knots, adding a rustic touch. Each side has a large, oval-shaped cutout handle integrated into the upper plank for easy lifting and carrying. The metallic frame is fastened with evenly spaced rivets, enhancing both durability and visual interest. The interior appears open and unobstructed, suitable for storing various items. The overall design suggests it is intended for practical use in urban environments such as garages, workshops, or storage rooms.
description: A sturdy wooden storage box with metal-reinforced edges and integrated oval cutout handles, featuring a rustic wood finish and industrial rivet details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wooden planks, metal frame, and a single oval cutout handle centered at the top.
description_view_1: Side view with similar features as the front, but with additional visible wood knots and grain patterns.
description_view_2: Opposite front view, nearly identical to view 0, with the same handle and metal frame details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with visible wood grain and knots, and the same handle placement.
